recent_completions.summary: Added an hourly semantic steward daemon, launchd template, mission/profile docs, and first semantic refresh report.
Added repo-owned mission/profile docs, mission-aware hourly beta tester automation, launchd template, and initial diagnostics report.
Fix expanded verse-card formatting so semantic and commentary blocks render under the verse text column instead of collapsing into the number gutter
Remove the purposeless secondary filter menu and simplify the library header so navigation starts directly under the main bar
Restructure the TOC root into grouped shelves so Title Page, The Holy Scriptures, and Other Church Writings are distinct first-level choices and move the Donaldson attribution onto the title page
Clean scripture chapter presentation by removing the obsolete score legend, tightening verse-number spacing, and making linked critical words visibly readable in the main reader
Add an explicit Open in Context action to channel morsels so users can open any result at the exact source paragraph or scripture verse with a clear visible focus state
Normalize General Conference source subtitles so speaker and session are both preserved after channel-opened hops, not just after direct TOC opens

Add a browser regression for source-to-source recursion so clicking a critical word inside one source and then opening another source from the channel preserves focus, title/meta formatting, and source context end-to-end
Preserve the new title-first source formatting inside click-opened morsel transitions so opening a source from the channel keeps the same clean title, subtitle, and location behavior
